text: I feel curious and attentive. The modern, slightly austere lounge in the first scene invites quiet contemplation, yet there is a subtle tension in the way the open spaces and beanbags suggest both comfort and anticipation. Entering the second scene, color and information burst forth—a wall of human inquiry and technological curiosity labeled 'R+D.' I feel energized by the sense of innovation around me, as though I’ve stepped into a living experiment of ideas and creation. Here, the boundaries between thought, discovery, and display seem porous. I carry both excitement and the weight of needing to understand and find my place in these evolving spaces.
